---
title: "Sex differences in the perceived dominance and prestige of women with and without cosmetics"
authors: "Mileva, V., Jones, A. L., Russell, R., Little, A., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2016
date: 2016-01-01
pub-journal: "Perception"
volume: "45(10)"
pages: "1166–1183"
doi: "10.1177/0301006616652053"
pdf: "assets/papers/2016/mileva_etal_2016.pdf"
categories: [cosmetics, first-impressions]
---
